Added_Other.mechanism: Prevents the combination of single makeup assets into a composite.

Added_Other.purpose: Streamlines the process of capturing game events, making it easier for developers to track player interactions.

Added_World.name: FFlagWTTOcclusionUseMappedNearestTriangle
Added_World.mechanism: Utilizes the nearest triangle mapping for occlusion calculations.
Added_World.purpose: Enhances rendering efficiency by reducing unnecessary visual processing.
